summary: Comprehensive testing of deposit customer info feature. All tests PASSED. Backend: 4/4 pytest tests passed. Frontend: All UI flows verified including deposit info on vehicle cards, deposit modal customer selection, new customer creation button, and deposit info in vehicle detail modal.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (width/height -1) on initial render - cosmetic only
React console warning: '<span> cannot be a child of <select>' - caused by visual editor wrapper, functionality works correctly

critical_code_review_comments: React console warning about span in select - caused by visual editor wrapper, not actual code issue. Functionality works correctly.

seed_data_used.cars: BMW 320i with deposit (amount=50000, customer=Mehmet Yıldız, date=2026-03-04), Mercedes C200 (Stokta, no deposit)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Deposit customer info feature fully working. BMW 320i has a deposit with customer info (Mehmet Yıldız, 50000 TL, 2026-03-04). VehicleCard shows deposit info using data-testid='deposit-info-{car.id}'. DepositModal uses data-testid='deposit-customer-select' for dropdown and data-testid='new-deposit-customer-btn' for new customer button. VehicleDetailModal shows deposit customer info in section with data-testid='vehicle-detail-deposit-info'. Three-dot menu shows 'Kapora Al' for Stokta cars and 'Kapora Düzenle' for cars with existing deposit.

mocked_apis.Email verification: MOCKED - verification code displayed on screen
